justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x (Jakarta EE) and Java to 21, replacing javax.persistence with jakarta.persistence and updating the MySQL connector artifact. However, it lacks Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) and retains JUnit 4 style in the test class (public class instead of package-private, though annotations are updated). The dependency management for JSTL seems unnecessary churn.
